executives.name: Christopher Calio
executives.background: Christopher T. Calio is President and Chief Executive Officer of RTX. He was appointed CEO in May 2024 and has been President since March 2023. Previously, he served as Chief Operating Officer and President of Pratt & Whitney.

executives.name: Pankaj Srivastava
executives.background: Pankaj Srivastava is the Chief Financial Officer of RTX, appointed in April 2024. He previously served as Senior Vice President, Finance and Corporate Strategy.

executives.name: Shane Eddy
executives.background: Shane G. Eddy is President of Pratt & Whitney. He joined Pratt & Whitney in 2016 and has held various leadership roles in operations and supply chain.

executives.name: Phil Jasper
executives.background: Phil Jasper is President of Raytheon. He previously served as President of Mission Systems at Collins Aerospace.

executives.name: Stephen Timm
executives.background: Stephen J. Timm is President of Collins Aerospace. He has been with the company and its predecessors for over 20 years.

executives.name: Raja Maharajh
executives.background: Raja Maharajh is Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary of RTX.

executives.name: Akhil Johri
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of United Technologies Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Special Advisor to the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Bernard Harris, Jr.
executives.background: Chief Executive Officer and Managing Partner of Vesalius Ventures, Inc. and former NASA astronaut.

executives.name: Dinesh Paliwal
executives.background: Partner at KKR & Co. Inc. and former Chairman and CEO of HARMAN International.

executives.name: George Oliver
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Johnson Controls International plc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Gregory Hayes
executives.background: Gregory J. Hayes is the Executive Chairman of the Board of RTX. He served as CEO from 2020 to 2024 and previously as Chairman and CEO of United Technologies Corporation.

executives.name: James Winnefeld, Jr.
executives.background: Retired U.S. Navy Admiral and former Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff.

executives.name: Jamie Gorelick
executives.background: Partner at Wilmer Cutler Pickering Hale and Dorr LLP and former Deputy Attorney General of the United States.

executives.name: Jesus Malave
executives.background: Mr. Malave has served as Chief Financial Officer since February 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of L3Harris Technologies, Inc.

executives.name: John Harris II
executives.background: Former Vice President of Business Development for Raytheon Company and CEO of Raytheon International.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Executive Officer, Raytheon International Inc. (Subsidiary)

executives.name: Leanne Caret
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President of The Boeing Company and President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Margaret O'Sullivan
executives.background: Jeane Kirkpatrick Professor of the Practice of International Affairs at Harvard University's Kennedy School.

executives.name: Robert Ortberg
executives.background: Former CEO of Rockwell Collins and former Special Advisor to the Office of the CEO of RTX.

executives.name: Robert Work
executives.background: Former U.S. Deputy Secretary of Defense.

executives.name: Stephen Page
executives.background: Mr. Page has served as a director since 2013. He previously served as Vice Chairman and Chief Financial Officer of United Technologies Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: President and Chief Executive Officer of Otis Elevator

executives.name: Thomas Kennedy
executives.background: Former Executive Chairman and CEO of Raytheon Technologies Corporation. Former Chairman and CEO of Raytheon Company.

executives.name: Todd Probert
executives.background: Mr. Probert has served as President of National Security and Innovative Solutions since 2020. He previously held executive roles at Raytheon.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Command and Control, Space, and Intelligence

executives.name: Tracy Atkinson
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President of State Street Corporation.

executives.name: William Swanson
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Raytheon Company. Served as Raytheon CEO from 2004 to 2014.
